name: Spirulina Shake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the 10 ice cubes in a food processor or blend.
2. Blend until slushy.
3. Add the ripe banana and blend until evenly mixed.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients (spirulina, herbal liquid, and honey) and blend until smooth.
Nutrition (per serving):
189 calories
0 g saturated fat
1 g total fat (3% of calories)
2 g protein (3% of calories)
44 g carbohydrates (94% of calories)
0 mg cholesterol
8 g sodium
1 g fiber
1 mg iron
290 IU vitamin A
14 mg vitamin C
